note_en: Fable 5 Max's own reads on every MSI 2026 Bracket Stage series — for entertainment, not betting advice. Double-elimination, all series Bo5, Fearless Draft (each champion locks out for both teams once picked in the series). Odds shown only where a real book price was found (GG.bet); otherwise Fable states its own probability plainly as a call, not a market price.
note_zh: Fable 5 Max 对每场 MSI 2026 淘汰赛的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。双败淘汰赛制，全部系列赛 Bo5，赛制为 Fearless Draft（同一系列赛内任意一方选过的英雄，双方均不可再选）。仅在查到真实盘口（GG.bet）时展示赔率；其余情况 Fable 直接给出自己的概率研判，不冒充市场价格。

champion.reason_en: Bilibili Gaming — LPL 1st seed, won 2026 First Stand Tournament (earned the region's bonus direct bracket slot). Most-cited favorite in pre-bracket power rankings; Knight in career-best form. Bracket-stage match vs T1 not yet played.
champion.reason_zh: Bilibili Gaming——LPL 头号种子，夺得 2026 First Stand（为赛区赢得额外直通名额）。赛前实力榜头号热门，Knight 状态正处生涯高点。淘汰赛首战对阵 T1 尚未开打。

champion.reason_en: Hanwha Life Esports — LCK 1st seed, opened the Bracket Stage with a clean 3-0 sweep of Team Secret Whales. Zeus/Gumayusi headline a roster that looked in total control in Game 1. Faces G2 next (UB R2).
champion.reason_zh: Hanwha Life Esports——LCK 头号种子，淘汰赛开局 3-0 横扫 Team Secret Whales。Zeus、Gumayusi 领衔的阵容在第一局展现绝对控制力。下一战迎战 G2（上位组第二轮）。

champion.reason_en: T1 — LCK, three-time reigning World Champion (Worlds 2025 first-ever three-peat), swept through Play-Ins 9-0 including two 3-0s over Team Liquid Alienware. The tournament's biggest X-factor in elimination formats; opens the Bracket Stage vs BLG.
champion.reason_zh: T1——LCK，卫冕三届世界冠军（2025 世界赛完成史上首次三连霸），Play-In 阶段 9 战全胜，两次 3-0 横扫 Team Liquid Alienware。淘汰赛赛制下最大的变数存在；淘汰赛首战对阵 BLG。

champion.reason_en: G2 Esports — LEC 1st seed. Reverse-swept Top Esports 3-2 from 0-2 down, the first international reverse sweep in three years — a genuine statement of draft/mental resilience. Dangerous dark horse into UB R2 vs HLE.
champion.reason_zh: G2 Esports——LEC 头号种子。曾 0-2 落后逆转 3-2 淘汰 Top Esports，是近三年首次国际赛事逆转横扫——充分展现了 BP 与心理层面的韧性。上位组第二轮战 HLE，是真正的黑马。

champion.reason_en: Top Esports — LPL 2nd seed. Lost the opener to G2 after leading 2-0, now must run the full lower-bracket gauntlet starting vs Team Secret Whales. Still dangerous, but the margin for error is gone.
champion.reason_zh: Top Esports——LPL 二号种子。首轮曾 2-0 领先 G2 但被逆转，现在必须从下位组从头打起，首战 Team Secret Whales。实力仍在，但已无试错空间。

champion.reason_en: FURIA — CBLOL 1st seed. Region historically the deepest underdog field at MSI; opens vs LYON with a real but long-shot path.
champion.reason_zh: FURIA——CBLOL 头号种子。该赛区历来是 MSI 中实力最悬殊的一档；首战对阵 LYON，理论有机会但胜算不大。

champion.reason_en: LYON — LCS 1st seed. Region's international results have lagged the other majors in recent cycles; opens vs FURIA in what both sides will see as their best shot at a bracket-stage win.
champion.reason_zh: LYON——LCS 头号种子。该赛区近几个周期的国际赛成绩落后于其余四大赛区；首战对阵 FURIA，双方都会把这场视为自己在淘汰赛阶段最现实的取胜机会。

champion.reason_en: Team Secret Whales — LCP 1st seed. Swept 3-0 by HLE in the opener with a low kill/tower count across the loss; now faces TES in the lower bracket with no room left for another sweep.
champion.reason_zh: Team Secret Whales——LCP 头号种子。首轮被 HLE 3-0 横扫，全程击杀与推塔数据落后明显；下位组迎战 TES，已无法再承受一次横扫。

fearless.note_en: Game 1 vs TSW: Jayce / Skarner / Cassiopeia / Ziggs / Shen — 5 unique picks, none repeated (Fearless Draft locks them out for Games 2-3 of the same series). Series-wide tally pending full VOD review.
fearless.note_zh: 对 TSW 第一局：贾克斯（Jayce）/ 斯卡纳 / 卡萨丁 / 吉格斯 / 慎，5 个不重复英雄（Fearless Draft 规则下本系列赛第 2-3 局不可再选）。全系列赛完整统计待补。

fearless.note_en: Game 1 vs HLE: Sion / Lee Sin / Ryze / Ezreal / Rell — lost the game and the series 0-3. Full series pool tally pending VOD review.
fearless.note_zh: 对 HLE 第一局：赛恩 / 李青 / 瑞兹 / 伊泽瑞尔 / 蕾尔——本局及系列赛均告负（0-3）。全系列赛完整统计待补。

fearless.note_en: Reverse-swept TES 3-2 from 0-2 down — by definition drew on a wider champion pool across 5 games than a series-opener sweep would need. Exact pick list pending VOD review.
fearless.note_zh: 0-2 落后逆转 3-2 淘汰 TES——五局系列赛意味着调用了比首局横扫更深的英雄池。具体选用清单待补。

fearless.note_en: Led G2 2-0 before losing 3 straight — pool depth data pending VOD review.
fearless.note_zh: 曾 2-0 领先 G2 后连丢三局——英雄池数据待补。

fearless.note_en: Bracket-stage series vs BLG not yet played.
fearless.note_zh: 对阵 BLG 的淘汰赛首战尚未开打。

fearless.note_en: Bracket-stage series vs T1 not yet played.
fearless.note_zh: 对阵 T1 的淘汰赛首战尚未开打。

fearless.note_en: Bracket-stage series vs LYON not yet played.
fearless.note_zh: 对阵 LYON 的首战尚未开打。

fearless.note_en: Bracket-stage series vs FURIA not yet played.
fearless.note_zh: 对阵 FURIA 的首战尚未开打。

series.reason_en: LCK 1st seed vs LCP 1st seed — a clear class gap on paper; HLE to win comfortably.
series.reason_zh: LCK 头号种子对 LCP 头号种子——纸面实力差距明显，HLE 稳胜。

series.reason_en: LEC 1st seed vs LPL 2nd seed — LPL depth favoured TES on paper; called for TES in 4. G2's reverse sweep from 0-2 down was the upset of the round.
series.reason_zh: LEC 头号种子对 LPL 二号种子——纸面上 LPL 深度更受看好，原判 TES 4 局取胜。结果 G2 从 0-2 逆转 3-2，是本轮最大爆冷。

series.reason_en: CBLOL 1st seed vs LCS 1st seed — the tournament's two long-shot regions meet; LYON's recent international reps give a slight scouting edge over FURIA.
series.reason_zh: CBLOL 头号种子对 LCS 头号种子——本届赛事两个胜算最低的赛区正面对决；LYON 近期的国际赛经验略占情报优势。

series.reason_en: The marquee tie of the round: 2026 First Stand champions vs the three-time reigning World Champion. Fable leans T1 in a close one — elimination-format pedigree is the tiebreaker on an otherwise even sheet.
series.reason_zh: 本轮焦点战：2026 First Stand 冠军对阵卫冕三届世界冠军。双方纸面接近，Fable 略微倾向 T1——淘汰赛赛制下的经验是关键的加分项。

series.reason_en: Winners of UB R1 meet for a spot in the Upper Bracket Final. HLE's clean 3-0 sweep looked more dominant than G2's 5-game escape from 0-2 down; leaning HLE, but G2's reverse-sweep run shows real depth. Exact match time not yet published — date confirmed July 5.
series.reason_zh: 上位组第一轮胜者会师，争夺上位组决赛席位。HLE 干净利落的 3-0 横扫，观感强于 G2 从 0-2 逆转的五局苦战；倾向 HLE，但 G2 的逆转过程也证明了阵容深度。具体开赛时间尚未公布——日期已确认为 7 月 5 日。

series.reason_en: UB R1 losers' elimination match. TES led G2 2-0 before losing three straight — underlying form still reads stronger than TSW, who were swept 0-3 outright with a low kill/tower count. Leaning TES. Exact match time not yet published — date confirmed July 6.
series.reason_zh: 上位组第一轮败者的生死战。TES 曾 2-0 领先 G2 后连丢三局——底层实力仍强于被 HLE 直接 0-3 横扫、击杀推塔数据均落后的 TSW。倾向 TES。具体开赛时间尚未公布——日期已确认为 7 月 6 日。

series.reason_en: Bracket not yet resolved — matchup TBD.
